# openai_certificates (Data Source)

List organization certificates.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_certificates" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) Organization certificates returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))
- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) active
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `valid_at` (Number) valid at
